content:
# Gas Oil Ratio

**Summary**: The ratio of gas volume to oil volume produced.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-taweel|Al-Taweel, 1997]] monitored the GOR to ensure consistency between measurement systems.

- [[2018-al-kadem|Al-Kadem, 2018]] evaluated the impact of high GOR on the accuracy of multiphase flow meters.

- [[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023]] evaluated gas-oil-ratio to determine its impact on microemulsion phase behavior.

## Scientific Context

- [[1997-al-taweel|Al-Taweel, 1997]] Indicates the amount of gas associated with the oil in the reservoir.

- [[2018-al-kadem|Al-Kadem, 2018]] evaluated the impact of high GOR on the accuracy of multiphase flow meters.

- [[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023]] evaluated gas-oil-ratio to determine its impact on microemulsion phase behavior.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1997-al-taweel|Al-Taweel, 1997]] Calculated from mass flow rates and PVT data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Gas and GOR variances were less than 5% for choke settings above 30/64". ([[1997-al-taweel|Al-Taweel, 1997, p. 80]])


- Wells with a GOR value of more than 2,000 scf/STB are considered high GOR wells where standard measurement tools often fail. ([[2018-al-kadem|Al-Kadem, 2018, p. 18]])

- Increasing GOR from 180 to 280 scf/stb shifted the optimal salinity from 17283 ppm to 14403 ppm. ([[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023, p. 112]])
